title: Statement of financial position
summary: 9609 A Level — assets, liabilities, and equity at a point in time.
learningObjectives: Interpret the statement of financial position.
Analyse financial position from case data.

simpleExplanation.title: Snapshot of worth
simpleExplanation.summary: The statement of financial position lists what the business owns and owes at year-end. Assets = liabilities + equity.

sections.content: **Statement of financial position** (10.1.2) pairs with **10.1.1**. Link to **5.1.2 working capital**.
